caveat: Real BR-PT handwriting (BRESSAY, ICDAR 2024). Domain gap: student essays, not occurrence forms — directional; also measure on curated real sheets. Word-level images (not lines); only 42/199 test IDs matched the downloaded subset.

vlm.run_note: column produced by `BRESSAY_DIR=datasets/bressay/bressay make eval-bressay N=20` with Ollama serving qwen2.5vl:3b; same frozen manifest.jsonl (first 20 pairs, deterministic) as the Tesseract column

notes: CER=1.0 for Tesseract on word-level handwritten images is expected: Tesseract is designed for page/line-level printed text, not isolated handwritten words. VLM mean_cer>4 means the model hallucinates long insertions for a single word crop — worse than typing nothing. Neither zero-cost reader reads real BR-PT handwriting; columns come from two runs on the SAME frozen manifest (Tesseract column: commit 2620343; VLM column: this run) because each run had only one reader available.
